prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Nausea, reduced appetite, and fatigue over the last 1-2 months with ongoing renal function decline.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.1 kg; Height 161.4 cm; BMI 24.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/82 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 203mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 231mg/dL; 3 months ago 213mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 63.7kg; 9 months ago 63.1kg; 6 months ago 65.3kg; 3 months ago 61.8kg; current 64.1kg), Height (12 months ago 161.4cm; 9 months ago 161.4cm; 6 months ago 161.4cm; 3 months ago 161.4cm; current 161.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 135mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 83mmHg; 9 months ago 83mmHg; 6 months ago 84mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 82mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 131U/L; 9 months ago 116U/L; 6 months ago 114U/L; 3 months ago 107U/L; current 128U/L), AST (12 months ago 92U/L; 9 months ago 94U/L; 6 months ago 88U/L; 3 months ago 84U/L; current 97U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 108mg/g; 9 months ago 109mg/g; 6 months ago 104mg/g; 3 months ago 147mg/g; current 113mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 38mg/dL; 9 months ago 34mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 128mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
